𝗥𝗢𝗫𝗨𝗠-𝗜𝗗𝗘 | Providing a comprehensive and powerful code editing and development environment directly on Android devices.  🔥 Super Hot!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 Dart 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Providing a comprehensive and powerful code editing and development environment directly on Android devices.
📅 Created: Dec 2024 • Updated: May 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Mobile-first code editor and mini IDE
✅ Built with Flutter
✅ Editing capabilities
✅ Terminal workflows
✅ Git/GitHub tooling
✅ AI assistance
✅ Runtime downloads
✅ Deep customization


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 258 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 18 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 7 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Roxum IDE is a mobile-first code editor and mini IDE for Android, built with Flutter. It integrates editing, terminal workflows, Git/GitHub tooling, AI assistance, and runtime downloads into a single application.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/heckmon/roxum-ide

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗡𝗢𝗧𝗘-𝗚𝗘𝗡 | To provide a seamless and intelligent note-taking experience that leverages AI to help users capture, organize, and refine their thoughts and knowledge.  🔥 Super Hot!

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a seamless and intelligent note-taking experience that leverages AI to help users capture, organize, and refine their thoughts and knowledge.
📅 Created: Aug 2024 • Updated: May 2026

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-native writing workflow (chat, rewrite, translate, polish)
✅ Image workflow (capture, recognize, describe, host, reuse)
✅ Native Markdown storage (local-first, portable)
✅ Built-in knowledge base (RAG, vector indexing, hybrid retrieval)
✅ Extensible AI stack (MCP, custom models, agents)
✅ Flexible sync (GitHub, Gitee, GitLab, Gitea, S3, WebDAV)
✅ Cross-platform availability (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS)


◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 11.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 904 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 116 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

NoteGen is a cross-platform, AI-native Markdown note-taking application designed for capturing ideas and transforming them into structured, readable notes. It offers a rich feature set including AI-powered writing assistance, image processing, local Markdown storage, and flexible synchronization options.

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/codexu/note-gen

𝗙𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗘𝗥𝗣𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗧-𝗦𝗨𝗜𝗧𝗘 | Anonymizing web scrapers by injecting realistic browser fingerprints to avoid detection.  🔥 Super Hot!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Anonymizing web scrapers by injecting realistic browser fingerprints to avoid detection.
📅 Created: May 2022 • Updated: May 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Generates configurable, realistic HTTP headers
✅ Generates realistic browser fingerprints affecting JS APIs
✅ Injects browser fingerprints into Playwright/Puppeteer instances
✅ Includes a generative Bayesian network for fingerprint creation
✅ Modular npm packages for separate or combined use


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 219 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 12 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

The fingerprint-suite is a collection of TypeScript tools designed to generate and inject realistic browser fingerprints. It helps anonymize web scraping activities by making automated browsers appear as unique human users, thus bypassing detection.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/apify/fingerprint-suite

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘𝗥-𝗜𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗦 | To provide web developers with a vast library of versatile and customizable SVG icons for use in their projects.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide web developers with a vast library of versatile and customizable SVG icons for use in their projects.
📅 Created: Feb 2020 • Updated: May 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Over 6000 high-quality SVG icons
✅ MIT-licensed
✅ Designed on a 24x24 grid with a 2px stroke
✅ Available in outline and filled versions
✅ Easy integration via ``, `background-image`, or inline SVG
✅ CSS customizable for size, color, and stroke-width


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 20.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.1K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 109 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Tabler Icons provides a comprehensive collection of over 6000 free, high-quality SVG icons designed for web projects. Each icon is crafted on a 24x24 grid with a 2px stroke, available in both outline and filled versions, and licensed under MIT.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/tabler/tabler-icons

𝗦𝗪𝗔𝗣𝗧𝗢𝗣 | Monitoring and visualizing swap memory usage on Linux and Windows systems through a text-based user interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Monitoring and visualizing swap memory usage on Linux and Windows systems through a text-based user interface.
📅 Created: Apr 2025 • Updated: May 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time animated swap usage graph
✅ List Swap devices with usage per disk / type
✅ Process-level swap consumption tracking
✅ Grouped view by software (aggregate mode)
✅ Multiple color themes
✅ Unit conversion (KB/MB/GB)
✅ Lightweight (<5MB memory usage)


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 150 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 8 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Swaptop is a real-time swap usage monitor for Linux and Windows systems, featuring a TUI interface that displays swap consumption per process and per software. It provides live-updating graphs, multiple color themes, and unit conversion, all with a lightweight memory footprint.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/luis-ota/swaptop
